episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: "Doxxing" sounds like a sport where men box with their genitals.
Ordering amberjack and receiving a fish with whiskers means being literally catfished.
A flat earther's suicidal walk in one direction accidentally proves the earth is round.

lines.text: -My mother was watching the news the other night,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and she heard people talk about doxxing one another.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She goes, "Honey, what is doxxing?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, "Oh, it's when two guys get in a ring
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and punch each other with their dicks."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: The waiter walks out and goes,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Who ordered the amber jack?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I raised my hand, and he sends it down in front of me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I look and I say, "Wait, this has whiskers.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Have I literally been catfished?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Can you imagine if you were a flat earther,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: like a depressed flat earther,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and one day you tell your flat earther,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Friends, I really can't take it anymore.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm just gonna walk this way, and I'm never gonna stop."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they're all like, "No, don't do it. No."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then around 80 days later,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you show up from the opposite direction,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And you're in a hot air balloon, and you're like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Guys, y'all are never gonna believe this!"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Okay, that's my time, Tony.
lines.label: fluff
